args: export PATH=/c/Users/chemo/AppData/Roaming/nvm/v18.17.1:$PATH && (lsof -ti:3007 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true) && npm start

windows.command: set PATH=C:\Users\chemo\AppData\Roaming\nvm\v18.17.1;%PATH% && set NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider && (for /f "tokens=5" %a in ('netstat -aon ^| findstr :3007 ^| findstr LISTENING') do taskkill /f /pid %a) 2>nul & npm start
